title: Isoxazoline derivatives and their uses in agriculture related application
abstract: The present invention provides isoxazoline derivatives and uses thereof in agriculture; in particular, the present invention provides a compound having formula (I), or a stereoisomer, an N-oxide or a salt thereof, preparation methods thereof, and compositions containing these compounds and uses thereof in agriculture, particularly uses as herbicide active ingredients for controlling unwanted plants; wherein R1, R2, R3, R4, n, R5, R6 and Hy are as described in the invention.
